title: Minevanilla modpack
description: A modpack that doesn't change any game mechanics but improves the vanilla experience. Please try it out!!!
body:
![The name of my modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a3f8da5db3e77bb6062531c69c673f3a8cdc7ed.png)

**This modpack aims to enhance the vanilla experience but doesn't change any game mechanics. Best choice for a relaxing and chill gameplay.**

## Key features in the pack
- Optimisation: Increase your fps significantly. Test on MacBook Air M1, the fps increases from 50 to 100. 
- Enhanced mob animations: Including Fresh Animation resource pack by FreshLX
- Better sound effects: Adding lots of mods, including Sounds by IMB11, Presence Footstep by Sollace, Sound Physics Remastered by henkelmax and so on.
- Better GUI and HUD: Adding Xaero's minimap by thexaero and Recolourful containers by Vi_Tul.
- **Check out more in the Gallery tab...**

<details>
<summary>Important</summary>

1. Make sure to use fabric if you use the default Minecraft launcher by Mojang. I still highly recommend you use third-party launchers such as Prism launcher, MultiMC, ATlauncher and other launchers, because it's easier to download mods or modpacks(Not an advertisement, but just an advice). **Be aware of viruses when choosing third-party Minecraft launchers.**
2. **Do not download version 1.0.0 if this is your first time using this modpack, as it doesn't include some structure mods. Version 1.1.0+ adds simple voice chat, here is the link to its [official wiki](https://modrepo.de/minecraft/voicechat/overview) to help you set up the voice chat for either a LAN world or a server.**
3. **I also have vanilla tweaks in my modpack, but it's not from Modrinth. You need to manually download [this](https://vanillatweaks.net/share/#sibjnP) and [this](https://vanillatweaks.net/share/#jjvZry).**

</details>



The full mod and resource pack list is in the dependencies of the version in the versions tab. Feel free to check it out.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/tRT57SdEd2E" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Dve_bZXYHuk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

If you have any ideas of what mods or resource packs I should include in this modpack. Please tell me from the report issue section.

**Note: Do not upload this modpack on other platforms or reupload on Modrinth. But you can showcase it in your video if you want to.**
